title: erodium neuradifolium subsp. linosae
intro: Erodium neuradifolium subsp. linosae is a plant species belonging to the geranium family, specifically a subspecies of the Erodium neuradifolium plant, known for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, it has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Erodium neuradifolium subsp. linosae can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders.
